title: Bright Plating Solutions - Plating Made Easy
description:
Not just the brightener - an all-in-one solution - without cyanide, fumes or hassle -  I promised to share this on a previous video you can buy the solutions on our shop at http://secure.workingink.co.uk/product-category/working-ink-plating-and-deposition-solutions/
it covers both bath plating and brush plating or wand plating
